heading: Availability to the public of flood-related data
label: 9712 Availability to the public of flood-related data

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Administrator shall make flood-related data available to the public on the website of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: Cost
children.label: b Cost
children.text: The Administrator may make the data under subsection (a) freely accessible or available at a cost that does not exceed the cost of preparing the data.
